meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Your Freelance SaaS: Master User Onboarding Today
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in manual support. Learn how to automate user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance projects effectively.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck to scaling your freelance projects is manual onboarding. By implementing a self-service, automated onboarding flow using Antigravity and Claude Code, you decouple your time from your revenue. This system empowers users to find value instantly, reducing churn and freeing you to focus on high-impact development work.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'manual loop.' Every new client feels less like a milestone and more like an anchor, dragging you into endless support threads and repetitive setup calls. Your hourly rate stays flat while your stress levels skyrocket, simply because your software lacks the intelligence to guide the user itself.

But what if your application became your best employee? By integrating an automated, intelligent onboarding layer, you shift from being a service provider to a product owner. This tutorial leverages the speed of Antigravity and the reasoning of Claude Code to build a high-conversion onboarding flow that scales while you sleep.

steps.title: Define the Value Milestone
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment where the user realizes the value of your app. We define this clearly so the onboarding flow focuses on driving the user there immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current database schema and user journey. Identify the specific action that correlates with long-term retention and outline a 3-step onboarding path to get users there.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Analyze app/models.py to identify the primary value realization event and propose an onboarding sequence.'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to track onboarding progress. This prevents users from getting stuck and allows you to resume them exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine implementation for user onboarding in TypeScript that tracks progress steps and saves state to the user profile object.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/lib/onboardingState.ts --prompt 'Implement a state machine for user onboarding progress tracking.'

steps.title: Integrate Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Contextual UI components reduce cognitive load. We implement interactive guides that trigger based on the user's current state machine position.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React tooltip component that fetches guidance text from the state machine and highlights UI elements based on the current onboarding step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a React tooltip component that integrates with our onboarding state machine.'

steps.title: Automate Success Triggers
steps.description: Use background tasks to verify user actions and automatically progress the onboarding state when a milestone is achieved.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a backend hook that listens for specific user events and updates the onboarding state machine once the 'Aha!' milestone is hit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/services/onboardingHooks.ts --prompt 'Implement background hooks to verify completion of onboarding steps.'

steps.title: Analytics and Loopback
steps.description: Instrument the onboarding flow to track drop-off points. Use this data to iteratively optimize the path for higher conversions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking to the onboarding flow to identify where users drop off. Generate a dashboard query to visualize this conversion funnel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Instrument the onboarding flow with analytics and generate a summary dashboard query.'

pro_tips: Never force a login before the user experiences the core value; use a 'guest session' to build trust first.
Keep onboarding under 3 minutes; use progress bars to provide a sense of completion and urgency.
Implement a 'skip' button for power users—nothing kills retention faster than forcing an expert to watch a beginner tutorial.
Use behavioral data to personalize the onboarding path; show different flows based on the user's industry or input.
Treat your onboarding flow as a living product feature; run A/B tests on the copy of your 'Aha!' moment trigger every 30 days.
content.next_steps: After deployment, monitor your session logs for 48 hours to identify where users are clicking 'skip'. Refine the copy on those specific steps to ensure your value proposition is crystal clear.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn your freelance projects into scalable SaaS engines. Stop manually onboarding clients and start building systems that work for you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
